title: Mechanical Drafters
description: Prepare detailed working diagrams of machinery and mechanical devices, including dimensions, fastening methods, and other engineering information.

tasks.text: Develop detailed design drawings and specifications for mechanical equipment, dies, tools, and controls, using computer-assisted drafting (CAD) equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Produce three-dimensional models, using computer-aided design (CAD) software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lay out and draw schematic, orthographic, or angle views to depict functional relationships of components, assemblies, systems, and machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Modify and revise designs to correct operating deficiencies or to reduce production problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and analyze specifications, sketches, drawings, ideas, and related data to assess factors affecting component designs and the procedures and instructions to be followed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Check dimensions of materials to be used and assign numbers to the materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design scale or full-size blueprints of specialty items, such as furniture and automobile body or chassis components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compute mathematical formulas to develop and design detailed specifications for components or machinery, using computer-assisted equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate with and consult other workers to design, lay out, or detail components and systems and to resolve design or other problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with customer representatives to review schematics and answer questions pertaining to installation of systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Position instructions and comments onto drawings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise and train other drafters, technologists, and technicians.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Lay out, draw, and reproduce illustrations for reference manuals and technical publications to describe operation and maintenance of mechanical systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draw freehand sketches of designs, trace finished drawings onto designated paper for the reproduction of blueprints, and reproduce working drawings on copy machines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Shade or color drawings to clarify and emphasize details and dimensions or eliminate background, using ink, crayon, airbrush, and overlays.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
